channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The war on Iran: Breaking down the words you’re hearing
item.description: The terminology of the US-Israel war on Iran is drawn from a range of linguistic origins.

item.title: What is uranium enrichment and how quickly could Iran build a nuclear bomb?
item.description: Al Jazeera spoke with MIT professor Ted Postol about what Iran could do with its 440kg of 60 percent enriched uranium.

item.title: Deadly Israeli settler attack on school kills two in Ramallah
item.description: Two people have been killed after Israeli settlers opened fire on a school in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Iran calls US ship seizure ‘piracy’: Is it?
item.description: Since the early days of the war on Iran, the US has been targeting Iranian ships in international waters.

item.title: Five major issues affecting the FIFA World Cup with 50 days to go
item.description: From the US-Israel war on Iran to exorbitant ticket prices and violence in host nations, here's what's gone wrong.

item.title: Is China a winner of the Iran war or facing economic risks?
item.description: China's economy beats expectations despite the Iran war, but weak demand and structural risks remain.

item.title: Iran captures two vessels in Strait of Hormuz after ship comes under fire
item.description: The IRGC says the aggression came in response to what it described as the US's capture of an Iranian commercial vessel.

item.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
item.description: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

item.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
item.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

item.title: Thirteen killed in second India fireworks blast in three days
item.description: Earlier this week, an explosion at a firecracker factory in neighbouring state Tamil Nadu left at least 25 dead.
